parameters.subject: =🌿 Outdoor Work Forecast — {{ $now.toFormat("MMMM d, yyyy") }}
parameters.message:
=

🌿 14-Day Outdoor Work Forecast

{{ $input.all().map(item => { const date = new Date(item.json.date); const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short" }); const formattedDate = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" }); let bgColor; if (item.json.band === "Prime") bgColor = "#C8E6C9"; else if (item.json.band === "Good") bgColor = "#B2DFDB"; else if (item.json.band === "Marginal") bgColor = "#FFF9C4"; else bgColor = "#FFCDD2"; return ``; }).join("") }}
Date Day Score Band High Temp (°F) Feels Like (°F) Precip % Rain (in) Wind (mph) Humidity % Notes
${formattedDate} ${dayOfWeek} ${item.json.score} ${item.json.band} ${item.json.temp} ${item.json.apparentTemp} ${item.json.precip} ${item.json.precipInches.toFixed(2)} ${item.json.wind} ${item.json.humidity} ${item.json.notes}
